script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz it(101) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak hung, beij bak lingz ngeih nyaeq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz ngeih(102) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz it hung, beij bak lingz sam nyaeq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz sam(103) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz ngeih hung, beij bak lingz seiq nyaeq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz seiq(104) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz sam hung, beij bak lingz haj nyaeq.

text: Bak lingz haj(105) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz seiq hung, beij bak lingz loeg nyaeq.

text: Bak lingz loeg(106) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz haj hung, beij bak lingz caet nyaeq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz caet(107) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz loeg hung, beij bak lingz bat nyaeq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz bat(108) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz caet hung, beij bak lingz gouj nyaeq.

script_note: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
text: Bak lingz gouj(109) dwg aen swhyienzsoq, beij bak lingz bat hung, beij bak it cib nyaeq.
